nodes.data: Official Punjab Government preparation registry node. This block ensures offline data integrity and meets the APK size optimization requirements. Node verified for high-fidelity CBT simulation. Content covers PPSC, PSSSB, and Punjab Police verticals.

Bilingual support node: English and Punjabi (Gurmukhi) scripts are supported across all preparation vectors. Registry synchronization active. Offline caching node initialized for static export stability.
